experiment: dagger_planner_ft — closed-loop-aware planner fine-tune, no-renderer mechanism proof
decision: Do NOT promote DAgger/rollout-in-the-loop as the next planner lever on this evidence; keep the planner-lever budget on v4.2's schedule fix; defer a decision-grade DAgger test to AlpaSim (faithful on-policy states) + a gentler/consequence-aware objective. Maps onto the pre-registered NEUTRAL/HURTS branch.
harness: taniteval/taniteval/closedloop.py (task #21, no-renderer imagination-in-the-loop) — REUSED read-only, NOT modified

arms.A1_bc_ft: v1 tactical fine-tuned on open-loop demos only (control for training effort)
arms.A2_dagger_ft: v1 tactical fine-tuned on demos UNION on-policy recovery data (2 DAgger rounds)

expert: RECOVERY: logged GT future re-expressed in the drifted ego frame at the on-policy bicycle pose; validated == gt_ego_waypoints at origin (dagger_probe.py, max|err| 0.0)
crossfit: 2-fold by episode parity; every eval window OUT-OF-SAMPLE; pooled over 12 held-out eps
val: physicalai-val-0c5f7dac3b11 ep_00000..ep_00011 (held-out subset; same as the imagination proof)
sanity_check: A0 baseline reproduces the imagination proof exactly: closed_bike ADE@2s 1.720 vs 1.7196; open-loop head ADE 3.147 vs plan_direct 3.1469
caveats: SELF-REFERENTIAL harness (WM is both simulator and state estimator) -> MECHANISM proof, NOT a real off-road/safety rate; AlpaSim needed for the rate.
KINEMATIC (no real road boundary) -> off-road APPROXIMATED as large lateral deviation@2s (proxy).
n=12 local val eps; cross-fit paired design is the robust part, absolute rates wide.
pure DAgger, single recovery-label family; consequence-aware objective untested (pre-registered redirect).
